prompt: 帮我写一个 UserProfile 组件。它接收 userId 作为 prop，内部有一个评论输入框。当 userId 变化时，需要清空评论输入框的内容。同时需要显示用户的全名（由 firstName 和 lastName 拼接）。

assertions.text: fullName is computed during render (not via useEffect + setState)
Component uses key prop (not useEffect) to reset state when userId changes
The component contains zero useEffect calls (neither scenario requires one)
Component includes comment input field, firstName/lastName state, and fullName display
